series_metadata.series_description: Signed contracts, agreements, and amendments for design, construction, commissioning, and other professional services required for the completion of agency projects. Includes, but is not limited to, payment and performance bonds, Drug Free Workplace certifications, EDGE certifications, and other related documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or for 15 years after project financial close. ; Electronic: 15 years after project financial close., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
